code: import React,{useEffect,useRef}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Particles=()=>{const containerRef=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{const container=containerRef.current;if(!container)return;for(let i=0;i<50;i++){const dot=document.createElement('div');dot.className='particle';dot.style.left="".concat(Math.random()*100,"%");dot.style.top="".concat(Math.random()*100,"%");dot.style.animationDelay="".concat(Math.random()*5,"s");container.appendChild(dot);}return()=>{container.innerHTML='';};},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{id:"particles",ref:containerRef,className:"particles"});};export default Particles;
